description: Field-level generation rules for each entity. Use a Faker library (faker-js, Faker.js, Python Faker) to implement.

field_rules.Name: FORMAT: '{Surname}, {FirstName} {MiddleInitial}.' using filipino_first_names + filipino_surnames
field_rules.Start Date: RANDOM date between 2018-01-01 and 2025-06-01 as text (YYYY-MM-DD)
field_rules.off_boarded_at: NULL for 50 rows; random timestamptz within last 2 years for 10 rows
field_rules.off_boarded_reason: IF off_boarded_at set: PICK from ['voluntary resignation', 'contract ended', 'no_show', 'redundancy', 'mutual agreement']
field_rules.employee_id: FORMAT: YYMM-NNNN where YY=start_year_last2, MM=start_month, NNNN=001-999

field_rules.Preferred Processor: RANDOM from processor_pool (weighted: hurupay 40%, wise 30%, wires 20%, higlobe 5%, wepay 5%)
field_rules.account_holder_name: Full name from same employee (copy Name)
field_rules.account_number: RANDOM 12-digit numeric string (do NOT use real account formats)

field_rules.employee_email: COPY from global_master_list work_email (60 employees; some have 2 rows)
field_rules.regular_rate: MATCH employee_hourly_rates for baseline; increment by 20–50 for subsequent rows
field_rules.effective_from: Row 1: '1970-01-01'. Row 2+: random date within last 12 months
field_rules.note: PICK from ['baseline backfill', 'annual review increase', 'performance adjustment', 'role change', 'market adjustment']
field_rules.created_by: HR manager email from demo employees

field_rules.work_email: COPY from global_master_list (55 of 60 active employees)
field_rules.full_address: CITY-LEVEL ONLY: '{City}, {Province}, Philippines' — NO street number
field_rules.orientation_done: true for promoted employees, false for others

field_rules.role: DISTRIBUTE per role_distribution map in global_rules
field_rules.revoked_at: NULL for active rows; set for ~10% as historical records

field_rules.work_email: ONLY employees with elevated roles (not viewer)
field_rules.feature: PICK matching feature for view_key (e.g. accounting → rates/payroll_wizard/payment_dispatch)

field_rules.role_title: PICK from ['Virtual Assistant', 'Case Manager', 'Data Analyst', 'Team Lead', 'HR Coordinator', 'Operations Specialist', 'Customer Support Specialist', 'Quality Analyst', 'Administrative Assistant', 'Financial Analyst']
field_rules.currently_working_on: SHORT generic text: 'Client intake processing and follow-ups', 'Weekly report compilation', 'Onboarding documentation review'
field_rules.skills: COMMA-SEPARATED: 'MS Office, Google Workspace, Data Entry', 'CRM, Customer Service, Communication'
field_rules.strengths: SHORT text: 'Strong attention to detail', 'Excellent written communication', 'Process-oriented problem solving'
field_rules.member_notes: SHORT manager note or empty: 'Reliable team player', 'Consistently meets deadlines'

field_rules.tone: positive for promotion; random for rate.change
field_rules.title: rate.change: 'Rate Update Effective [date]'; promotion: 'Congratulations on Your Promotion!'
field_rules.message: Realistic template message for each type
field_rules.read_at: NULL for 30% (unread); timestamptz within last 7 days for 70%

field_rules.department: FROM department_pool (one manager per department typically)
field_rules.revoked_at: NULL for current; timestamptz 3+ months ago for 3 historical rows

field_rules.name: COPY matching Name from global_master_list
field_rules.last_seen_at: 70% within last 24h; 20% within last week; 10% older

field_rules.uploaded_at: Weekly intervals going back 8 weeks from today
field_rules.is_current: true for most recent; false for others

field_rules.email: FROM active employees (50 employees x 8 weeks)
field_rules.name: Matching Name from global_master_list

field_rules.bank_used: RANDOM from ['BDO Unibank PH', 'Metrobank PH', 'BPI PH', 'RCBC PH']

field_rules.name: Fictional Filipino name (Surname, Firstname format)
field_rules.work_email: NULL for pending_work_email; demo.biz email for others

field_rules.bank_city: Philippine city (Quezon City, Makati, Cebu, Davao)

field_rules.reason: Short generic reason per leave type

field_rules.dispute_date: Monday of a recent payroll week

field_rules.pinned: true for 3 most important; false for rest
field_rules.title: EXAMPLES: 'Important: Updated WFH Policy', 'Q2 All-Hands Meeting — Save the Date', 'Welcome New Team Members!'

field_rules.body: Celebratory or work-related text. EXAMPLES: 'Happy work anniversary to our amazing teammate! 🎉', 'Great job team on hitting the Q2 targets!', 'Friendly reminder: timesheets due Friday 5PM'

field_rules.post_id: Linked to swall_posts (~60% of posts have comments)
field_rules.body: SHORT friendly reply. EXAMPLES: 'Congrats! Well deserved!', 'Thank you for the reminder!', 'Happy anniversary! 🥳'

field_rules.preferred_delivery_location: CITY-LEVEL: 'Quezon City, Metro Manila', 'Cebu City, Cebu', 'Davao City, Davao del Sur' etc.

field_rules.items: JSON array of 10–15 gift items with name, description, estimated_usd fields

field_rules.from_entity_name: Fictional company name like 'Sunrise Digital Services'

field_rules.is_manager: true for team leads; false for individual contributors

faker_library_recommendations.javascript: npm install @faker-js/faker — use faker.person.firstName(), faker.finance.accountNumber(), faker.internet.email()
faker_library_recommendations.python: pip install Faker — use fake.name(), fake.bban(), fake.email()
notes: Always use example.com or demo.biz for emails — never generate real-looking domains
For bank account numbers: use 12-digit random integers, NOT Faker's credit card or real bank formats
For SWIFT codes: use fictional 8-char codes (e.g. 'BDOPPHMM') — do NOT use real BIC codes
For addresses: city + province + 'Philippines' only — omit street numbers and barangay
For Filipino names: use the provided name pools in global_rules rather than Faker's Western names
